en: Sort the rings, relax your mind
es: Ordena los anillos, relaja tu mente
fr: Trie les bagues, détends ton esprit
de: Sortiere die Ringe, entspanne deinen Geist
pt: Ordene os anéis, relaxe sua mente
it: Ordina gli anelli, rilassa la mente
hi: छल्लों को छाँटें, अपने मन को आराम दें
ja: リングを整理して心をリラックス
vi: Sắp xếp vòng, thư giãn tâm trí

ja: カラーブラインドモード

tr: Bir dahaki sefere daha iyi şanslar!
fr: Plus de chance la prochaine fois!
ko: Bir dahaki sefere daha iyi şanslar!

ja: プライバシーポリシー
答えが間違っています。確認に失敗しました。
vi: Câu trả lời sai. Xác minh thất bại.

en: Please review and accept our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy to continue.
tr: Devam etmek için lütfen Kullanım Koşulları ve Gizlilik Politikamızı inceleyip kabul edin.
id: Tinjau dan terima Ketentuan Layanan serta Kebijakan Privasi untuk melanjutkan.
es: Revisa y acepta nuestros Términos de Servicio y Política de Privacidad para continuar.
fr: Veuillez consulter et accepter nos Conditions d'utilisation et notre Politique de confidentialité pour continuer.
de: Bitte lies und akzeptiere unsere Nutzungsbedingungen und Datenschutzrichtlinie um fortzufahren.
pt: Revise e aceite nossos Termos de Serviço e Política de Privacidade para continuar.
it: Consulta e accetta i Termini di Servizio e l'Informativa sulla Privacy per continuare.
ar: يرجى مراجعة شروط الخدمة وسياسة الخصوصية والموافقة عليهما للمتابعة.
hi: जारी रखने के लिए कृपया सेवा की शर्तें और गोपनीयता नीति स्वीकार करें.
ru: Ознакомьтесь и примите Условия обслуживания и Политику конфиденциальности чтобы продолжить.
ja: 続行するには利用規約とプライバシーポリシーを確認して同意してください。
zh: 请查看并接受我们的服务条款和隐私政策以继续。
ko: Devam etmek için lütfen Kullanım Koşulları ve Gizlilik Politikamızı inceleyip kabul edin.
vi: Vui lòng xem và chấp nhận Điều khoản Dịch vụ và Chính sách Quyền riêng tư để tiếp tục.

en: Sort colored rings onto matching poles. When a pole is full and all colors match, it clears.
tr: Renkli halkaları eşleşen direklere yerleştirin. Bir direk dolduğunda ve tüm renkler eşleştiğinde temizlenir.
id: Sort colored rings onto matching poles. When a pole is full and all colors match, it clears.
es: Coloca anillos de colores en los postes que coincidan. Cuando un poste está lleno y todos los colores coinciden, se despeja.
fr: Placez des bagues colorées sur les poteaux correspondants. Lorsqu'un poteau est plein et que toutes les couleurs correspondent, il se vide.
de: Sortiere farbige Ringe auf passende Stangen. Wenn eine Stange voll ist und alle Farben übereinstimmen, wird sie geleert.
pt: Coloque anéis coloridos em postes correspondentes. Quando um poste está cheio e todas as cores combinam, ele é limpo.
it: Posiziona anelli colorati sui pali corrispondenti. Quando un palo è pieno e tutti i colori corrispondono, si libera.
ar: Sort colored rings onto matching poles. When a pole is full and all colors match, it clears.
hi: Sort colored rings onto matching poles. When a pole is full and all colors match, it clears.
ru: Sort colored rings onto matching poles. When a pole is full and all colors match, it clears.
ja: Sort colored rings onto matching poles. When a pole is full and all colors match, it clears.
zh: Sort colored rings onto matching poles. When a pole is full and all colors match, it clears.
ko: Sort colored rings onto matching poles. When a pole is full and all colors match, it clears.
vi: Sort colored rings onto matching poles. When a pole is full and all colors match, it clears.

en: Tap a pole to pick up its top ring, then tap another pole to drop it. A ring can only land on empty or same-color tops.
tr: Bir direğe dokunarak üstteki halkayı alın, ardından başka bir direğe dokunarak bırakın. Bir halka yalnızca boş veya aynı renkteki üst halkaların üzerine konabilir.
id: Tap a pole to pick up its top ring, then tap another pole to drop it. A ring can only land on empty or same-color tops.
es: Toca un poste para tomar su anillo superior, luego toca otro poste para soltarlo. Un anillo solo puede colocarse sobre postes vacíos o del mismo color.
fr: Tapez sur un poteau pour prendre sa bague du dessus, puis tapez sur un autre poteau pour la déposer. Une bague ne peut atterrir que sur des poteaux vides ou de la même couleur.
de: Tippe auf eine Stange, um ihren obersten Ring aufzunehmen, dann tippe auf eine andere Stange, um ihn abzulegen. Ein Ring kann nur auf leere oder gleichfarbige Stangen gelegt werden.
pt: Toque em um poste para pegar seu anel superior e, em seguida, toque em outro poste para soltá-lo. Um anel só pode pousar em postes vazios ou da mesma cor.
it: Tocca un palo per prendere il suo anello superiore, poi tocca un altro palo per rilasciarlo. Un anello può atterrare solo su pali vuoti o dello stesso colore.
ar: Tap a pole to pick up its top ring, then tap another pole to drop it. A ring can only land on empty or same-color tops.

en: Some levels introduce special rings with their own rules. Tap a special ring while holding it to see what it does.
tr: Bazı seviyeler kendi kuralları olan özel halkalar içerir. Özel bir halkayı tutarken üzerine dokunarak ne yaptığını görebilirsiniz.
id: Some levels introduce special rings with their own rules. Tap a special ring while holding it to see what it does.
es: Algunos niveles presentan anillos especiales con reglas propias. Toca un anillo especial mientras lo sostienes para ver qué hace.
fr: Certains niveaux introduisent des bagues spéciales avec leurs propres règles. Tapez sur une bague spéciale tout en la tenant pour voir ce qu'elle fait.
de: Manche Level führen spezielle Ringe mit eigenen Regeln ein. Tippe auf einen gehaltenen Spezialring, um seine Funktion zu sehen.
pt: Alguns níveis introduzem anéis especiais com regras próprias. Toque em um anel especial enquanto o segura para ver o que ele faz.
it: Alcuni livelli introducono anelli speciali con regole proprie. Tocca un anello speciale mentre lo tieni per vedere cosa fa.
ar: Some levels introduce special rings with their own rules. Tap a special ring while holding it to see what it does.

en: Clear every pole to win. Good luck!
tr: Kazanmak için tüm direkleri temizleyin. İyi şanslar!
id: Clear every pole to win. Good luck!
es: ¡Limpia todos los postes para ganar. Buena suerte!
fr: Videz tous les poteaux pour gagner. Bonne chance!
de: Räume alle Stangen ab, um zu gewinnen. Viel Glück!
pt: Limpe todos os postes para vencer. Boa sorte!
it: Libera tutti i pali per vincere. Buona fortuna!
ar: Clear every pole to win. Good luck!
hi: Clear every pole to win. Good luck!
ru: Clear every pole to win. Good luck!
ja: Clear every pole to win. Good luck!
zh: Clear every pole to win. Good luck!
ko: Clear every pole to win. Good luck!
vi: Clear every pole to win. Good luck!

es: Explora los reinos que te esperan.
it: Esplora i regni che ti attendono.
hi: आगे के राज्यों का अन्वेषण करें.
ja: この先の王国を探検しよう
vi: Khám phá các vương quốc phía trước.

en: Make each rod a single color
id: Buat setiap tiang menjadi satu warna
es: Haz cada barra de un solo color
fr: Faites de chaque tige une seule couleur
pt: Faça cada haste de uma cor única
it: Rendi ogni asta di un solo colore
hi: प्रत्येक छड़ को एक ही रंग का बनाएं
ja: 各ロッドを単色にしてください
vi: Làm cho mỗi thanh có một màu duy nhất
